name: MatSSL
description: Robust Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Metallographic Image Segmentation

name: PF-DiffSeg
description: Diffusion-based pipelines for paired image + mask generation based on phase-fraction and segmentation training with synthetic augmentations

name: SD3.5-DreamBooth-LoRA
description: Parameter-aware Stable Diffusion 3.5 fine-tuning (DreamBooth+LoRA) for controllable microstructure image generation with continuous and categorical process variable conditioning

name: Microstructure-SegNet
description: Unified semantic segmentation pipeline for microstructure validation on UHCS and Aachen datasets using U-Net with VGG-16 encoder and efficient channel attention
